capabilities.name: Text Completion
capabilities.description: Generate coherent and contextually relevant continuations of a given text.
capabilities.usage: Used for creative writing, completing sentences, or generating responses in a conversation.
capabilities.constraints: May not always provide factually accurate information and should be reviewed for critical applications.
capabilities.example_prompt: The future of artificial intelligence in healthcare is

capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze text to determine the sentiment behind it, categorizing it as positive, negative, or neutral.
capabilities.usage: Used in market research, social media monitoring, and customer feedback analysis.
capabilities.constraints: May misinterpret sarcasm or nuanced emotions and is context-dependent.
capabilities.example_prompt: What is the sentiment of the tweet: 'I just love how this app never works when I need it most!'?

capabilities.name: Text Summarization
capabilities.description: Condense a longer piece of text into a brief summary that captures the main points.
capabilities.usage: Utilized in summarizing articles, reports, or lengthy documents.
capabilities.constraints: May omit important details and should not be used for critical decision-making without review.
capabilities.example_prompt: Summarize this article about quantum computing.

tools.name: Text Summarizer
tools.description: A tool that condenses larger texts into concise summaries while retaining essential information.
tools.usage: For summarizing articles, reports, or any lengthy document to grasp key points quickly.
tools.constraints: Text input should not exceed 5000 characters.
tools.example_prompt: Can you summarize this article about climate change for me?

tools.name: Image Classifier
tools.description: This tool identifies and categorizes objects within images.
tools.usage: Use it to determine what objects or scenes are present in a provided image.
tools.constraints: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG. Maximum file size 5MB.
tools.example_prompt: Please classify this image after I upload it.

tools.name: Sentiment Analysis
tools.description: Analyzes text to determine its sentiment, categorizing it as positive, negative, or neutral.
tools.usage: Useful for understanding public opinion on social media posts, reviews, etc.
tools.constraints: May misinterpret sarcasm or nuanced emotions and is context-dependent.
tools.example_prompt: Analyze the sentiment of this review: 'The service was terrible and the food was cold.'
